## What does this PR do?

## Type of change

- [ ] New community skill (`skills/community/`)
- [ ] Bug fix (skill, rule, hook, or install script)
- [ ] Core skill improvement (maintainer-proposed only)
- [ ] Rule change (maintainer-proposed only)
- [ ] Documentation

## For new skills — checklist

- [ ] Skill is in `skills/community/<name>/SKILL.md`
- [ ] SKILL.md follows the required format (name, description, trigger phrases, steps, output)
- [ ] Trigger phrases are distinct from existing skills (checked `skills/core/` and `skills/community/`)
- [ ] Skill is generic — no language or framework lock-in
- [ ] Tested on a real project — describe briefly below
- [ ] No external service or package dependencies
- [ ] Content is original. If inspired by another source, it is credited in the file header.
